name: @botcoin/coretex-handler
description: Single-line drop-in router for the SWCP coordinator. Adds /internal/* RPCs and merge-bonus claim-calldata; never touches /v1/challenge or /v1/submit.

scripts.test:unit: if [ -d ./test/unit ]; then node --test --test-reporter=spec ./test/unit; else echo 'no unit tests for @botcoin/coretex-handler'; fi
